content:
Hey everyone,

<@201897606572539904> asked me yesterday to see runs of my DTide Teams. So I filmed them all! They are all at Alert 4.

Recent Banner Awakeners and what video to watch:

Pickman - Wave 2 Sorel https://youtu.be/0hiqbEC405w

Horla - Wave 4 Daffodil https://youtu.be/JMSi_r_ZOy0
Corposant - Wave 1 Jenkin https://youtu.be/EEIpRy_a-eI

Clementine, Ryker and Kathi - Wave 1 Kathi https://youtu.be/E6s58-GKHaA
Doresain Salvador - Wave 5 Doresain https://youtu.be/UwR5o_EjyZQ

No recent banner units - Wave 3 Liz n Lily https://youtu.be/YKIAuv6IYEA
